info.title: Meal Planner API
info.description: Meal Planner API. Generate personalized weekly meal plans instantly based on dietary goals, restrictions, and calorie targets. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Generate personalized weekly meal plans instantly based on dietary goals, restrictions, and calorie targets.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
